Games","timezone":"UTC","generated_at":"2026-04-22T22:11:58.5247+00:00"},"functions_and_rpcs":[{"return_type":"void","routine_name":"award_clout","logic_preview":"
BEGIN
  -- Insert into ledger for auditing
  INSERT INTO clout_ledger (user_id, amount, reason)
  VALUES (auth.uid(), points_to_add, audit_reason);

  -- Update the actual profile
  UPDATE profiles 
  SET clout_points = clout_points + points_to_add
  WHERE id = auth.uid();
END;
"},{"return_type":"void","routine_name":"award_clout","logic_preview":"
BEGIN
    -- If no one is signed in, auth.uid() is null, and this insert fails 
    -- silently due to the NOT NULL constraint on user_id in clout_ledger.
    IF auth.uid() IS NOT NULL THEN
        INSERT INTO public.clout_ledger (user_id, amount, reason, event_id, geopost_id)
        VALUES (auth.uid(), p_amount, p_reason, p_event_id, p_geopost_id)
        ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT unique_point_action DO NOTHING;
    END IF;
END;
"},{"return_type":"void","routine_name":"award_clout","logic_preview":"
BEGIN
  -- We use 'ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING'
  -- If the user already has points for this Event + Type, the database 
  -- will silently ignore the second request instead of crashing the app.
  INSERT INTO clout_ledger (user_id, amount, reason, event_id, checkin_type)
  VALUES (p_user_id, p_amount, p_reason, p_event_id, p_checkin_type)
  ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT unique_clout_award DO NOTHING;
END;
"},{"return_type":"void","routine_name":"award_submitter_clout","logic_preview":"
DECLARE
    submitter_id UUID;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Find the owner of the event
    SELECT user_id INTO submitter_id 
    FROM public.events 
    WHERE id = target_event_id;

    -- 2. Award points if the submitter exists and isn't the one checking in
    -- (Prevents awarding yourself for checking into your own event twice)
    IF submitter_id IS NOT NULL AND submitter_id != auth.uid() THEN
        INSERT INTO public.clout_ledger (user_id, amount, reason, event_id)
        VALUES (
            submitter_id, 
            clout_amount, 
            'Submitter Bonus: Attendee Check-in', 
            target_event_id
        )
        ON CONFLICT (user_id, reason, event_id, geopost_id) DO NOTHING;
    END IF;
END;
"},{"return_type":"trigger","routine_name":"handle_post_reaction_clout","logic_preview":"
DECLARE
    v_author_id UUID;
BEGIN
    -- Only signed-in users can GIVE points
    IF NEW.user_id IS NULL THEN
        RETURN NEW;
    END IF;

    -- Retrieve the author. If they were signed in when posting, v_author_id is set.
    SELECT user_id INTO v_author_id FROM geoposts WHERE id = NEW.post_id;

    -- Anonymous posts are ineligible for rewards
    IF v_author_id IS NULL THEN
        RETURN NEW;
    END IF;

    -- Prevent self-voting points
    IF v_author_id = NEW.user_id THEN
        RETURN NEW;
    END IF;

    -- Award points to the author (even if offline) if this user hasn't reacted before
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM post_clout_given WHERE user_id = NEW.user_id AND post_id = NEW.post_id) THEN
        -- Record the interaction
        INSERT INTO post_clout_given (user_id, post_id) VALUES (NEW.user_id, NEW.post_id);

        -- Deposit points to author's account
        INSERT INTO clout_ledger (user_id, amount, reason, geopost_id, checkin_type)
        VALUES (v_author_id, 5, 'GeoPost Reaction Clout', NEW.post_id, 'post_reaction')
        ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT unique_clout_award DO NOTHING;
    END IF;

    RETURN NEW;
END;
"}]}
